case_title: EMBARCADERO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS WEISBROT, MARCIA

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISBROT, MARCIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EMBARCADERO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEISBROT, MARCIA $69.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $159.50, DEFENDANT'S RECENT PAYMENT OF $69.50 SHALL BE CREDITED AGAINST THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEISBROT, MARCIA
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM JUN-13-2007 TO DEC-10-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED-GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $69.50 FILED BY EMBARCADERO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WEISBROT, MARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY WEISBROT, MARCIA IS GRANTED. NO APPEARANCES. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED.
